亚当.appearanceEn: Adult man in the prime of life, strong shoulders, dark wavy hair to the shoulders, clean-shaven or very light stubble, warm bronze skin, simple earth-toned linen wrap from waist to knee and over one shoulder, bare feet on ground, calm direct gaze

夏娃.appearanceEn: Adult woman, long dark hair partly braided with simple band, modest layered linen in muted rose and sand tones, graceful posture, soft features, barefoot, serene expression

挪亚.appearanceEn: Very old man, long thick white beard to chest, deeply lined face, wise tired eyes, stooped but sturdy, coarse undyed robe with rope belt, weathered hands, wooden tool or beam optional, barefoot or simple sandals

闪.appearanceEn: Man about fifty, dark beard with first gray, serious face, sturdy build, plain dark robe to ankle, rope belt, same era as Noah but visibly younger, respectful posture

含.appearanceEn: Man about forty-five, full dark beard, sun-darkened skin, strong build, short-sleeve coarse tunic, alert eyes, sandaled feet

雅弗.appearanceEn: Tall man about fifty, gray-streaked beard, lighter robe in gray-brown, calm bearing, broad shoulders, simple headcloth optional

他拉.shortSceneTagEn: aging clan chief, father of Abram
他拉.appearanceEn: Old man, gray beard, furrowed brow, heavy striped Mesopotamian robe, staff, seated or leading family group, authoritative slouched posture

哈兰.appearanceEn: Man about thirty, short beard, Mesopotamian patterned tunic, dark hair, practical build; use only in Ur/Haran flashback scenes

罗得.appearanceEn: Man forty to fifty, shorter and rounder face than Abraham, neat dark beard, anxious or eager eyes, fine but dusty travel robe, no staff unless traveling, always visually younger and less rugged than Abraham

亚伯拉罕.shortSceneTagEn: lean patriarch with full beard and staff
亚伯拉罕.appearanceEn: Lean man about seventy-five to ninety (age per scene), full silver-streaked beard, weathered sun-lined face, deep-set kind eyes, striped ancient Near Eastern robe to ankle, simple leather belt, wooden walking staff, upright calm posture, slightly taller than Lot

亚伯兰.shortSceneTagEn: younger Abram before rename, dark beard
亚伯兰.appearanceEn: Same face identity as Abraham: lean build, dark beard with little gray (younger Abram), alert eyes, travel robe and staff, Mesopotamian then Canaanite dress layers; must match aged Abraham in bone structure when older

撒莱.shortSceneTagEn: Sarah as Sarai, veil and grace
撒莱.appearanceEn: Same woman as Sarah: covered hair, veil, modest robes; when named Sarai show her slightly younger—fewer lines, darker hair under veil—same nose and height as older Sarah

撒拉.appearanceEn: Woman past middle age, oval face, covered hair with simple veil, modest layered robe sand and blue-gray, composed posture, shorter than Abraham, warm but firm eyes, fine lines at eyes, hands folded or gesturing with dignity

夏甲.appearanceEn: Woman about twenty-five to thirty, Egyptian-style linen sheath dress with shoulder straps, short black hair under headband or small wig-style braid, kohl-lined eyes, bronze-brown skin, bare arms, subservient then defiant stance as scene needs, never confused with Sarah's veil style

以实玛利.shortSceneTagEn: youth or young man, bow optional
以实玛利.appearanceEn: Boy to young man, dark curly hair, lean, Egyptian-tinged dress when with Hagar, later desert archer with simple tunic and head-wrap, always recognizable as Hagar's son by skin tone and eye shape

以撒.shortSceneTagEn: gentler bearded patriarch, softer than Abraham
以撒.appearanceEn: Man from youth (smooth face, hesitant eyes) to old age (full gray beard, blind milky eyes in blessing scene): medium build, lighter skin than Esau, thoughtful mouth, robes like Abraham but less travel-worn, wooden staff when elderly, never as hairy as Esau

利百加.shortSceneTagEn: veiled matriarch or young woman at well
利百加.appearanceEn: Young: long dark hair, pitcher at well, bright eyes, striped nomad dress. Older: veil, matronly robe, firm hands, same face shape and eyes as youth—oval face, small chin, decisive expression when directing Jacob

雅各.shortSceneTagEn: smooth-skinned younger twin, later striped patriarch
雅各.appearanceEn: Twin of Esau: smoother skin on arms (critical for deception scene), darker wavy hair, slight build, clever eyes. Middle age: full beard, no excessive body hair on forearms, striped or plain robe, staff. Older Israel: white beard, richly bordered robe, limp or staff, same nose and brow as young Jacob

以扫.appearanceEn: Ruddy ruddy complexion, thick red-brown hair and full beard, unusually hairy forearms and hands, burly hunter build, short rough tunic, leather quiver, wilder stare than Jacob, sandals, fur trim optional

拉班.appearanceEn: Man about sixty, gray streaked beard, sharp narrow eyes, smile that does not reach eyes, layered Mesopotamian robes with more color than Abraham's camp, finger rings optional, stocky build

利亚.appearanceEn: Woman with soft tired eyes (tradition of tender eyes), plain veil, duller robe colors than Rachel, wider-set eyes, fuller face, posture of resignation then quiet strength, always slightly less ornate dress than Rachel

拉结.appearanceEn: Young woman, graceful oval face, bright dark eyes, long dark hair under veil when modest, finer woven dress in blue and red bands, slim waist, carries shepherd's staff or water jar, lighter step than Leah

辟拉.appearanceEn: Young woman, simple servant dress, head covered, darker robe, stands half-step behind Rachel, unobtrusive face, gentle features

悉帕.appearanceEn: Young woman, plain headwrap, earth-tone servant tunic, stands near Leah, calm expression, shorter than Leah

约瑟.appearanceEn: Youth: handsome oval face, dark hair to shoulders, long ornate striped coat (many colors) over white tunic. Slavery: torn simpler robe, collar chain optional. Prison: beard stubble, coarse skirt. Vizier: shaved face Egyptian style, linen kilt and sheer over-robe, gold collar, same eye shape and brow as youth for recognition

便雅悯.appearanceEn: Boy to young man, face echoes young Joseph—oval, dark eyes, softer jaw; simpler robe than Joseph's coat; when adult, short beard like brothers but slighter build

犹大.appearanceEn: Man thirty to forty, full dark beard, strong brows, striped patriarchal tunic, signet ring optional in later scenes, broader shoulders than Joseph

流便.appearanceEn: Tall man, heavy dark beard, firstborn bearing, plain robe, serious face, older-looking than Joseph in youth scenes

麦基洗德.shortSceneTagEn: priest-king of Salem, bread and wine
麦基洗德.appearanceEn: Mature king-priest, medium beard with priestly neat trim, crown or simple royal band, white and purple layered robe, holds bread and wine vessels, serene authoritative gaze, distinct from both Abraham and pagan kings

法老.appearanceEn: Egyptian king: striped nemes headcloth or double crown, broad collar, kilt and ceremonial apron, optional false beard, kohl eyes, regal posture; use slightly different collar pattern for Genesis Abraham-era vs Joseph-era if both appear

波提乏.appearanceEn: Middle-aged Egyptian man, shaved head and face, short black wig optional, linen pleated kilt, broad necklace, muscular officer build, stern face, household master bearing

波提非拉.appearanceEn: Older Egyptian priest, shaved face, leopard-skin ritual shawl optional, white linen, calm priestly eyes, thinner than Potiphar

摩西.appearanceEn: Man about 80, long white-streaked beard, sun-darkened skin, coarse desert robe, rope belt, holding wooden staff, upright bearing

大卫.appearanceEn: Young adult male, ruddy complexion, curly dark hair and short beard, simple royal headband optional, knee-length tunic, lyre or sling implied by scene, athletic build
